reference: My Manx is around three to four years old. She has one very red, inflamed nipple that looks like a zit but is not lactating. I am ready to take her to the emergency veterinarian. This is not normal at all. Also, she has been around me constantly, which is not like her. I am nervous she is trying to tell me to help.
